label: wide_grip_push_up
summary: A wide-grip push-up is a valid setup variation and should not be treated as an error by itself.
good_signals: consistent hand placement across the set
common_misreads: wide hand placement is not automatically a form issue
coaching_cues: Judge the variation separately from true issue markers.

label: knee_push_up
summary: A knee push-up is a valid push-up variation and should be assessed using its own movement context rather than full push-up expectations.
common_misreads: reduced loading does not automatically mean poor form
coaching_cues: Keep variation context separate from issue labels.
